MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-06-2016 Set For Case Management Conference On Jan-25-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Apr-27-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Henry Su of Barulich Dugoni Law Group, Inc. telephone number 650-645-1618 for Defendant Acclaim Home Care Inc.
Roland The of The Alberts Firm telephone number 714-441-1144 for Defendant Lourdes Yumang.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS ACCLAIM HOME CARE INC and RANDOLPH DE LEON'S Motion To Compel Arbitration is granted. Although plaintiffs Eileen O'Connor and Elizabeth Zantos are not signatories to the arbitration agreement, as the asserted successors of decedent Bridget O'Connor, they are bound by the terms of the agreement. While the court recognizes that there is no authority directly on point, the court can discern no reason why the plaintiffs, who are "standing in the shoes of decedent" in bring these survival claims, should not be bound by the arbitration agreement to the same extent that the decedent would be bound if she were still alive. Order signed in open Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/HK)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-07-2016 Continued To Sep-26-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-26-2015 Set For Trial On Apr-25-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
